posts.text: Happy Birthday America. Even to the ever present American Fatalists. Your country is not the source of all evil in the world. It's ok to be happy today. ✌️

posts.text: Happy Birthday, America --the oldest constitutional democracy,* and the most self-correcting of them all. *To nitpickers: San Marino is older, but pop. is 30K.
